flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Clark Atlanta University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($24.0k → $28.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Clark Atlanta University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($24.0k → $28.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Clark Atlanta University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Clark Atlanta University rose 58% between 2021 and 2024 (23.4% → 37.0%).
